title: Elmasri & Navathe DBMS Architecture Framework
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating the core components and relationships in the database system architecture as presented by Elmasri and Navathe.
relationships: Users interact with the DBMS via queries and applications
DBMS software uses the schema to process queries and manage data
DBMS software accesses and modifies the stored data in the database
Data dictionary provides metadata about the database structure to the DBMS
